title: Repository Structure — Inventory
description: Detected pattern inventory + component fingerprints for a scanned workspace. Written by slopbrick to .slopbrick/inventory.json. Read by slopbrick, stackpick, gir, MCP server, and any future usebrick.dev tool.

version.description: Schema version. Currently '3' (bumped in v0.15.0 rebrand from memory.md → structure.md and the multi-score model). Bump when adding/removing fields or changing the on-disk directory name.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this inventory was generated.

workspace.description: Absolute path of the scanned workspace. Informational only.

scannedFiles.description: Number of files included in the scan.

scanDurationMs.description: Duration of the scan in milliseconds.

patterns.description: Detected patterns grouped by category, sorted by fileCount desc within each category.

category.description: Memory category. Must match one of the canonical Constitution field names so the same key set is used for declared vs detected.

imports.description: Bare import specifiers in the project that matched this pattern.

fileCount.description: Number of files that import any of the matching specifiers.

files.description: Files in the project that export this component.

fingerprint.description: Stable hash for dedup + cross-project similarity (16-char hex prefix of sha256).

line.description: 1-indexed line of the component definition's start.

endLine.description: 1-indexed line of the component definition's end.
